---
title: "Antiseizure Medications"
---

ANTIEPILEPTIC DRUGS
INITIAL AED CHOICE
Partial (with or without generalization) (cid:31) Carbamazepine, Phenytoin, most new agents
Primary Generalized (cid:31) Valproate, Lamotrigine, Topiramate
(Phenytoin and Carbamazepine can worsen)
Absence (cid:31) Ethosuximide, Valproate, Lamotrigine, Topiramate
AED DOSING
COMMONLY Seizure Initial dose and escalation, Therapeutic Total daily dose Dose
USED AEDS Type adults Level Ranges range, adults schedule
(children)
Carbamazepine Partial onset 100mg BID, 8-12 600-2400mg BID-QID
(Tegretol, Tegretol ↑ 100mg BID (15-35mg/kg) (BID XR
XR, Carbatrol) q3-5d &
Carbatrol)
Felbamate Broad spect 300mg TID, 60-180 2400-4800mg BID-TID
(Felbatol) limited ↑ 300mg TID q7d (100-125mg/kg)
Gabapentin Partial onset 300mg QD, 12-25 900-6000mg TID-QID
(Neurontin) ↑ 300mg QD to 300mg TID, (20-60mg/kg)
then 300mg TID q7d
Lamotrigine Broad spect 25mg QD, 10-20 100-500mg BID
(Lamictal) ↑ 25-50mg q2wks (1-5mg/kg)
Lamotrigine + Broad spect 50mg QD, 300-800mg BID
EI-AED ↑ 50mg q2wks (5-15mg/kg)
Lamotrigine + Broad spect 25mg QOD, 100-300mg QD-BID
VPA ↑ 25mg q2wks (0.5-2mg/kg)
Levetiracetam Broad 250mg BID, 20-40 1000-4000mg BID
(Keppra) spectrum ↑ 250-500mg BID qwk (30-100mg/kg)
Oxcarbazepine Partial onset 150mg BID, 12-35 900-2400mg BID-TID
(Trileptal) ↑ 150-300mg BID qwk (20-50mg/kg)
Phenobarbital Partial onset 30-60mg QD, 20-40 60-240mg QD-BID
(Luminal) ↑ 30-60mg q1-2wk (4-8mg/kg)
Phenytoin Partial onset 200-300mg QD 10-20 total 200-500mg QD-BID
(Dilantin) (Oral load (1.0-2.0 free) (4-8mg/kg)
6-7mg/kg
q8h x 3 doses)
Pregabalin Partial onset 50-100mg BID 150-600mg BID-TID
(Lyrica) ↑ 50-100mg BID qwk
Tiagabine 4mg QD, 32-56mg BID-TID
(Gabitril) ↑ 4-8mg (cid:31) BID-TID qwk (0.1-0.4mg/kg)
Topiramate Broad spect 25-50mg QD, 8-25 100-600mg BID
(Topamax) ↑ 25mg BID (5-15mg/kg)
q1-2wk
Valproate Broad spect 125-250mg BID, 60-120 1000-4000mg BID-TID
(Depakote,) ↑ 125-250mg BID qwk (15-60mg/kg) (QD - ER)
Rufinamide Broad spec 200 to 400 mg BID, ↑400 to 1600-3200mg BID
(Banzel) (LGS) 800mg/day q2 days
Lacosamide Partial 50mg BID, ↑by 100mg per 200-400mg BID
(Vimpat) Onset day qweek
Zonisamide Broad spect 100-200mg QD, 20-30 200-600mg QD-BID
(Zonegran) ↑ 100-200mg QD (8-12mg/kg)
Qwk
Perampanel Partial 2-4mg QHS, 2mg-12mg QD
(Fycompa) Onset ↑ 2mg QD
Q 2wks


Clobazam (Onfi) Broad Spect 5mg QD x 2 wks, then BID 5mg QD – 40mg BID
(LGS, esp) ↑ 5mg QD
Qwk
Eslicarbazepine Partial onset 400mg daily x 1 week; may 400mg-1200mg QD
(Aptiom) ↑ 400mg daily Qwk
AED SIDE EFFECTS AND INTERACTIONS
Medication Side Effects Interaction
Carbamazepine Diplopia, blurred vision, lethargy, PHT, PB, VPA – decrease levels
(CBZ) liver failure, SIADH, aplastic Diltiazem, verapamil, cephalosporins,
anemia antifungals – increase levels
Gabapentin Lethargy, ataxia, weight gain None
(GPN)
Levetiracetam Lethargy, dizziness, depression, None
(LEV) psychosis
Lamotrigine Insomnia, rash (severe) PHT, PB, OCPs – decrease levels
(LMG or LTG) VPA – increase levels
Oxcarbazepine Hyponatremia, nausea, rash CBZ, PB, PHT, VPA, verapamil – decrease
(OXC) levels
Phenobarbital Lethargy, sedation, depression VPA
(PB)
Phenytoin Nausea/vomiting, dizziness, CBZ, PB – decrease levels
(PHT or DPH) sedation, ataxia, gingival VPA – increase levels
hyperplasia, liver failure, Decrease OCP effectiveness
osteoporosis
Topiramate Cognitive impairment, dizziness, PHT, CBZ, VPA – decrease levels
(TOP or TPM) metabolic acidosis, kidney stones, Decrease OCP effectiveness
hypohidrosis
Valproic Acid Weight gain, hepatotoxicity, PHT, PB, TOP, CBZ – decrease levels
(VPA) hyperammonemia, tremor, rash Elavil – increase levels
Zonisamide Sedation, rash, kidney stones, PHT, CBZ, PB – decrease levels
(ZNS) hypohidrosis
